name: L3E
description: Last 3 Edges - 5 algorithms for solving the last 3 edges of the Pyraminx. Essential for sub-5 solves.

algorithms.name: Sune
algorithms.notation: R U R' U R U R'

alternatives.notation: L U L' U L U L'
R' U R U R' U R

algorithms.setup: L' U' L U' L' U' L

algorithms.name: AntiSune
algorithms.notation: R' U' R U' R' U' R

alternatives.notation: L' U' L U' L' U' L
R U' R' U' R U' R'

algorithms.setup: R U R' U R U R'

algorithms.name: Lefty Bars
algorithms.notation: R' U' L' U L R

alternatives.notation: U L R U R' U' L'

algorithms.setup: R' L' U' L U R

algorithms.name: Righty Bars
algorithms.notation: U' R' L' U' L U R

alternatives.notation: L U R U' R' L'

algorithms.setup: L R U R' U' L'

algorithms.name: 2 Flip
algorithms.notation: L R' L' R U' R U R'

alternatives.notation: R' L R L' U L' U' L
R' U L' U' L U' R

algorithms.setup: U' R' U L' U L U' R
